description: Financial Modeling Prep provides stock market, company fundamentals, historical pricing, economic, ETF, forex, crypto, and related financial datasets. It serves these datasets to developers and analysts through a large catalog of market-data endpoints and AI-agent connectivity.
summary: Financial Modeling Prep exposes a REST financial-data API at `https://financialmodelingprep.com/stable/` authenticated by FMP API key, plus an MCP server at `https://financialmodelingprep.com/mcp` that supports API-key connection URLs and an OAuth 2.0 flow.
